name: ifarm-platform
description: iFarm - Ecossistema Digital do Agronegócio Brasileiro

scripts.db:create: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U ifarm -d ifarm -c 'CREATE DATABASE ifarm_orders;' 2>/dev/null; docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U ifarm -d ifarm -c 'CREATE DATABASE ifarm_payments;' 2>/dev/null; docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U ifarm -d ifarm -c 'CREATE DATABASE ifarm_commission;' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Databases created'
